currentClaim: Threadsmith v0.2.0 Context Packet v1 is accepted locally: schema, builder, persistence API, runtime artifact boundary, full workspace tests, and build all pass.

doneWhenChecklist.label: v0.2.0 Context OS implementation plan 已写入 docs/plans
Context Packet v1 schema 已定义并从 domain 导出
runtime 可以从 ProjectState 生成 context packet

knownGaps: .threadsmith/context/current-packet.json is intentionally ignored as a regenerable runtime artifact, not committed truth.
Repo Map v1, Evidence Summary v1, Role-specific Packets v1, and Control Deck Context Surface are planned later slices, not part of Context Packet v1.
multi-provider automatic execution remains out of scope for this release line.
